name: Marcben James Samuel S
bio: Machine Learning Engineer skilled in Python, data preprocessing, and building models with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit-learn. Experienced in supervised/unsupervised learning, deep learning, and NLP. Passionate about deploying scalable AI solutions using APIs, Docker, and cloud platforms.

education.school: St. Joseph's College of Engineering, Chennai

experience.desc: Built an offline multilingual (Tamil/Hindi/English) government voice assistant using low-latency RAG architecture.
Performed data analysis and preprocessing in collaboration with development teams.
Analyzed datasets and generated reports to produce actionable insights.

projects.title: Govt Voice Assistant (RAG)
projects.desc: A production-ready, offline-capable voice assistant for Government services supporting Tamil, Hindi, and English using RAG-first architecture.

projects.title: System Health Monitoring App
projects.desc: A comprehensive hardware monitoring app built with Python and PyQt6 for real-time monitoring, wear tracking, and AI-powered analysis.

projects.title: Crime Rate Prediction System
projects.desc: Built a safety score and crime rate prediction system integrating Maps API with public datasets.

projects.title: Glider Distance Estimation
projects.desc: Implemented glider distance estimation using YOLO object detection and trajectory analysis.

achievements: National Hackathon Winner — Vel Tech (Cyber Guardians'26)
Best Project — National Hackathon, New Prince College (2025)
